<!--
  Thanks for contributing! A few things before you open a PR:

  - For anything non-trivial, open a discussion first. Shadow is an
    opinionated design (see CLAUDE.md); aligning up front saves rewrites.
  - Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR. Split refactors from
    behaviour changes when you can.
  - "Code must earn its abstractions": three similar lines beat a premature
    generalization.
-->

## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences on what the PR does and why. -->

## Related issue / discussion

<!-- Link with `Closes #123` or `Refs #123`. If there's no issue yet, explain
     the motivation here. -->

## How I verified

<!-- What did you run locally? -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test:dev`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Dashboard UI changes reviewed in the browser (if applicable)

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything non-obvious: tricky trade-offs, things you rejected, follow-ups
     you deliberately left for a separate PR, etc. -->
